commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is contributor-provided real API proof plus ordinary maintainer handling of the Vercel authorization status, not a narrow automated source repair.; Cleared: The diff only changes scoped cursor decoding, tests, and changelog text; it adds no dependency, workflow, secret, install, or code-execution surface. commands.review_summary:
The branch updates public skill-list cursor decoding to accept full Convex getPage index keys for supported non-trending API sorts, adds regression coverage, and documents the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main emits self-describing getPage indexKeys as nextCursor but rejects replayed full keys longer than the explicit sort field count, and the linked report provides concrete curl steps for the public failure.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor-provided real API proof plus ordinary maintainer handling of the Vercel authorization status, not a narrow automated source repair.

target.title: fix(api): accept full skill list pagination cursors
target.body:
## Summary

Accepts the full public skill-list pagination cursor shape emitted by `getPage()` for non-trending public API sorts.

## What changed

- Self-describing public list cursors may include the full helper index key, including Convex tie-breaker fields.
- Legacy raw-array cursor validation remains strict.
- Pagination tests now mock realistic `getPage()` keys and cover first-page to second-page API pagination.

## Public behavior

The public cursor contract is unchanged: clients send the cursor returned by the previous response. The server now accepts the full cursor shape it already emitted instead of treating it as stale or restarting pagination.

## Behavior proof

Focused terminal proof from the public list cursor behavior:

```text
$ vitest run convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts --reporter verbose --testNamePattern "paginates the public API list from getPage's full self-describing cursor|continues from valid cursors|guards the public API list"

✓ convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts > public skill list deterministic cursors > continues from valid cursors and emits the selected index with the next cursor
✓ convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts > public skill list deterministic cursors > guards the public API list against stale index cursors too
✓ convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts > public skill list deterministic cursors > paginates the public API list from getPage's full self-describing cursor

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  3 passed | 2 skipped (5)
```

Full focused suite also passed:

```text
$ bun run test convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       5 passed (5)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       1986 passed (1986)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```
